hero.title: Your ultimate golf companion
hero.subtitle: Real-time scorecard, WHS handicap, friend bets and professional stats. All in one place.

features.title: Everything you need on the course
features.subtitle: Built for golfers of all levels

scoring.title: Digital scorecard
scoring.desc: Capture your scores in real time with hole GPS, par and automatic handicap.

handicap.title: WHS Handicap
handicap.desc: Official World Handicap System calculation updated after every round.

bets.title: Bets with friends
bets.desc: Nassau, Skins, Match Play. Make your round more exciting with your friends.

stats.title: Advanced stats
stats.desc: Analyze your fairways, GIR, putts and trends to improve your game.

social.title: Social feed
social.desc: Share your best rounds, eagles and holes-in-one with the community.

spectator.title: Spectator mode
spectator.desc: Follow your friends' round in real time from anywhere.
